PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.label: VEE purple raids
PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.instruction: a raid made wrong by impossible scale or timing; write the colony bracing for a familiar threat that no longer feels familiar, without inventing the battle's outcome

instructions.li: a purple raid — make the scale feel wrong through what the pawn can count, hear, or see while taking position; do not invent casualties or victory
a purple raid — write the old defense routine straining against an attack whose timing or numbers do not fit
a purple raid — keep the moment at warning and first contact unless supplied facts already show more

PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.tone: with alarm at a familiar threat grown unnaturally large

tones.li: tense and disbelieving, counting danger that should not be this large
urgent and tactical, routine defenses suddenly feeling too small

PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.label: VEE ambient conditions
PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.instruction: a VEE condition shared across the colony; fold its bodily or psychic pressure into the day's reflection without treating it as a sudden private diagnosis

instructions.li: an ambient VEE condition — show how the body or mind carried it through one ordinary task today
an ambient VEE condition — keep it part of the day's atmosphere, not a separate medical revelation unless the supplied facts make it one
an ambient VEE condition — match relief or distress to the named condition instead of assuming every effect is harmful

PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.tone: with a shared psychic or bodily pressure hanging over the day

tones.li: body-aware and atmospheric, the whole colony living under the same condition
quietly altered, relief or strain woven into routine
